blocks.body: Stative Verbs helps you recognize verbs of state and see why they usually do not appear in continuous forms.

{ "title": "5. Quick summary", "items": [ "Stative verbs describe a state, not an active action.", "They often talk about opinion, possession, perception, emotion, or desire.", "In their basic meaning, they usually do not appear in Continuous.", "Say I know, I believe, I want, she loves, not continuous forms.", "Some verbs can switch to a dynamic meaning: think, have, taste, smell.", "If the meaning is a state, the safe choice is usually a simple form." ] }
